mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, module, type, description, parent_id, sort_order, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, code, module, type, description, parent_id, sort_order, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_permission WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_permission (id, name, code, module, type, description, parent_id, sort_order, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{module}, #{type}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_permission SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_permission WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_permission WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
